title: centaurea flexilis
intro: Centaurea flexilis, also known as yellow knapweed or Nevada knapweed, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of fever and colds. Centaurea flexilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed for its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
